author: paul
body: Added a couple of talking points for the welcome script.

author: paul
body: Good write-up — let's add a photo of the flight deck.

author: paul
body: Should we add the P-51 as a stop on this route?

author: paul
body: Trimmed the school-group section to keep it under the hour. Reads better now.

author: rebecca.holt
body: Thanks Paul. Can you add a line about where the buses park?

author: paul
body: Done. Added drop-off and pickup notes at the top.

author: paul
body: The cutaway draws kids in every time. Worth leading with it.

author: marcus.bell
body: Good orientation page. I'll point the new Tuesday volunteer here.

author: paul
body: Added the no-touch reminder near the front so it's the first thing they read.

author: paul
body: Tom's anecdote about the Denver diversion landed well with the group. Keeping it.

author: margaret.chen
body: Could we get a photo of the radial engine for this one?

author: paul
body: I'll take one Thursday morning before the doors open.

author: paul
body: Walking the warbird route in this order keeps the timing tight. Tested it twice.

author: rebecca.holt
body: Restoration crew confirmed the safety line stays at the yellow tape. Updated.

author: paul
body: Good. Let's not let visitors past the tape even with the crew present.

author: paul
body: Added a common-questions block to the cockpit write-up. Most folks ask about the autopilot.

author: marcus.bell
body: This is the cleanest version of the welcome script we've had. Nice work.

author: paul
body: Shortened the history bit. Visitors want to get into the galleries.

author: paul
body: One-pager prints clean on a single sheet now. Front desk has copies.

author: margaret.chen
body: Filed Capt. Hadley's recap under the docent reference folder. Thanks Paul.
